subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf, O My Handmaiden! The glance of God's loving-kindness, exalted be His glory, hath ever been and shall remain directed upon thee. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا امتی لازال لحاظ عنایت حق جل جلاله با شما بوده و هست الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
